reviews.review_description: A lot of games are better suited to other game consoles and platforms but this one is a VR winner, everything you could want in a Hook and Ring game and more with the right island vibe to boot.
I have always loved the hook and ring game and now being able to play on a virtual beach in the Caribbean.  Jackpot.  Well done.

As a dad with 3 kids that play VR, it was nice to finally find a game that pertains to us dads.  This reminds me of when raccoon Mario hit the scene in Super Mario brothers 3! Graphics are spot on and just a fun game to play. 
A++++
